title: FABLE Modpack
description: The official Modpack of Minecraft FABLE
body:
**This is the official Modpack up to FABLE 3**

![Logo of Fable 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6e867e48d12314c385632284ef4541b141f4a5f_0.webp)

## What is Fable?

Minecraft **Fable** is a PvP project based on Minecraft Legend and Minecraft Titan.
It is played with a project-specific, self-coded mod that enriches the PvP experience with several new features. This mod is also based on Legend/Titan.
A detailed mod introduction can be found here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gQMUxD3h2yo (only in german though)

An estimated 100 participants will initially be in a spawn circle and must fight for survival in teams of two on a self-built custom map!
Each team starts the project with two team lives (respawn tickets). For each death, they lose one (-1), and for each kill, they receive half a ticket back (+0.5).
A team can accumulate a maximum of three team lives.
If the number of team lives drops below one, respawning is no longer possible, and the player is eliminated early upon death. However, you can be brought back into the project later if your teammate manages to increase the number of team lives back to 1.
A team is permanently eliminated when both team members are dead and have less than 1 team life, as there is no one left who can increase this number through kills.
You are also permanently eliminated when you have accumulated 4 strikes. Anyone with 4 strikes cannot be brought back into the project through kills.
The goal of the game is to be the last surviving team.

## What does this modpack offer?

Besides the name giving **Fable Mod**, which adds a bunch of new weapons, gears and balanced game mechanics, this modpacks includes mods like Terralith & Tectonic to spice up **world generation**. To ensure every player a fair experience, the most important **optimization mods** for Fabric 1.21.8 are also inmcluded!

This modpack is best played in **competitive PvP multiplayer** environments.
